texto: Outrage alternated with a sweaty fear he had never before felt. Something, it seemed to him was being drained from him, leaving the body feeling like a very dry sponge, very light, completely at the mercy of sly toying gusts of wind.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ayi Kwei Armah: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Outrage alternated with a sweaty fear he had never before felt. Something, it seemed to him was b…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sucesso, body, emotion pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e emotion.

texto: For seasons and seasons and seasons all our movement has been going against our self a journey into our killer's desire.
explicacao: Citação de Ayi Kwei Armah sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “For seasons and seasons and seasons all our movement has been going against our self a journey in…” articula autoestima, homo, sapiens em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como viagem e sapiens.

texto: Disgust with injustice may sharpen the desire for justice. Readers who don’t see this connection merely wish to be entertained, and I have neither skill nor desire to turn the agony of a people into entertainment.
explicacao: Citação de Ayi Kwei Armah sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Disgust with injustice may sharpen the desire for justice. Readers who don’t see this connection …” articula reflexao, africa, audience em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como audience e impetus.

texto: Unless, of course, one chose to join the increasing numbers who had decided they were so deep in despair that there was nothing worse to fear in life. These were men who had finally, and so early, so surprisingly early seen enough of something in their own ives and in the lives around them to convince them of the final futility of efforts of efforts to break the mean monthly cycle of debt and borrowing, borrowing and debt.
explicacao: Citação de Ayi Kwei Armah sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Unless, of course, one chose to join the increasing numbers who had decided they were so deep in …” articula reflexao, debt, meaning-of-life em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e meaning-of-life.

texto: I did point out that I have no prophetic gifts. I write books because I tried to do something more useful and failed. Since I've been trained to write, I do that as a defense against total despair. And seeing people like you, who are actively engaged in trying to salvage pieces of our wrecked lives, gives me hope that after all we are not alone.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ayi Kwei Armah: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “I did point out that I have no prophetic gifts. I write books because I tried to do something mor…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, african, writing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e writing.
